title: veronica arvensis var. reniformis
intro: Veronica arvensis var. reniformis, also known as the kidney speedwell or reniform speedwell, is a variety of the Veronica arvensis plant, a type of flowering plant in the figwort family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat kidney stones and other urinary tract issues due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Veronica arvensis var. reniformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and help manage conditions such as gout and arthritis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to support urinary health and relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections.
